compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for performance reviewer agent build
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add tests asserting performance reviewer agent builds with model=opus and bright-line severity keywords.

### Test approach
Run build-review-agents.sh, verify code-reviewer-performance.md generated with model: opus, contains bright-line severity terms.

### Files to modify
- tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
